message:
feat(e2e): agent lifecycle E2E tests with rich logging

Add comprehensive E2E test suite that exercises the full agent lifecycle
through the gateway API (spawn, get, list, terminate), validates WS
connection and UI state on dashboard/agents pages, and uses the logging
framework to capture console, network, and WebSocket diagnostics.

Closes bd-1vr1.11

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
